primary_subset: fault actually applied while the assigned sensor group is available

safe_recovery.temperature_data: first half of the Batch 7 calibration partition
safe_recovery.selector_data: second half of the Batch 7 calibration partition
safe_recovery.selector_faults: four fault types with two calibration-only realizations each
safe_recovery.safe_threshold: minimum calibration negative transfer, then maximum accuracy
safe_recovery.balanced_threshold: maximum calibration accuracy, then minimum negative transfer

modern_baseline.RO-MER: one expert per physical sensor group plus one joint expert and a sample-dependent router

external_data_boundary: No located public candidate jointly provides natural sensor-failure events, independent downstream recovery labels and multiple devices; controlled or task-mismatched candidates remain boundary evidence.
